mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cash_transactions (wallet_id, type, amount, balance_after, pg_transaction_id, status, reference_id) VALUES (#{walletId}, #{type}, #{amount}, #{balanceAfter}, #{pgTransactionId}, #{status}, #{referenceId})
mapper.select: SELECT id, wallet_id, type, amount, balance_after, pg_transaction_id, status, reference_id, created_at, updated_at, processing_token FROM cash_transactions WHERE id = #{id} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE cash_transactions SET status = 'COMPLETED', pg_transaction_id = #{pgTransactionId}, balance_after = #{balanceAfter}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE cash_transactions SET status = 'PROCESSING', pg_transaction_id = #{paymentId}, processing_token = #{processingToken}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: SELECT id, wallet_id, type, amount, balance_after, pg_transaction_id, status, reference_id, created_at, updated_at, processing_token FROM cash_transactions WHERE status = 'PROCESSING' AND updated_at < #{threshold}
